caption: The video shows a close-up view of a vehicle's center console, featuring a wood-grain dashboard trim and a wooden gear shift knob. At the top of the console, a control panel includes several buttons, some of which are labeled with text such as "TEMP SET" and "AUTO". Below this panel is a dark, rectangular screen integrated into the dashboard. As the sequence progresses, a person's hand enters the frame from the bottom left. The individual reaches toward the left side of the screen and presses a circular control knob. The camera remains stationary throughout the sequence, focusing on the interaction between the person's finger and the control knob of the car's infotainment system while the gear shift remains positioned in the foreground.
